name: grok-subagent-codex-marketplace
description: A Codex plugin that delegates bounded work to the official Grok Build CLI over ACP.

scripts.test: node --check plugins/grok-subagent/mcp-server/server.mjs && node --test tests/*.test.mjs && node plugins/grok-subagent/tests/mcp-smoke.mjs && node tests/validate-repo.mjs
